name: Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF)
description: The Claude Certified Architect — Foundations (CCAF) validates practitioners can make informed decisions about tradeoffs when implementing real-world solutions with Claude. Tests foundational knowledge across Claude Code, Agent SDK, Claude API, and MCP.

domains.name: Agentic Architecture & Orchestration
domains.description: Domain 1 (27%): Design agentic loops, orchestrate multi-agent systems, configure subagent patterns, implement multi-step workflows.

domains.name: Tool Design & MCP Integration
domains.description: Domain 2 (18%): Design tool interfaces, implement MCP error responses, distribute tools across agents, integrate MCP servers.

domains.name: Claude Code Configuration & Workflows
domains.description: Domain 3 (20%): Configure CLAUDE.md files, create slash commands, apply path-specific rules, integrate into CI/CD.

domains.name: Prompt Engineering & Structured Output
domains.description: Domain 4 (20%): Design precise prompts, apply few-shot prompting, enforce structured output, implement validation loops.

domains.name: Context Management & Reliability
domains.description: Domain 5 (15%): Manage conversation context, design escalation patterns, implement error propagation, handle uncertainty.
